Package org.eventb.pp

Class AbstractRodinTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms.AbstractPPTest
org.eventb.pp.AbstractRodinTest
Direct Known Subclasses:
HypothesisSensitivity, RodinTests, SeedSearchProblem, TestPPTranslator
public abstract class AbstractRodinTest extends AbstractPPTest
Common implementation for validation tests of the new Predicate Prover based on lemmas coming form the Rodin platform.
